rule.name: sub-agent-context-minimal-occupation
rule.description: User hard rule (2026-06-07 1:38 + 1:40 GMT+8): "**子 agent 会把上下文撑爆吧**" + "**能不能让子 agent 不占用上下文,或者极少的占用呢**".

rule.name: sub-agent-headroom-forced-compression-gate
rule.description: User hard rule (2026-06-07 1:50 GMT+8): "**我觉得可以加红线当上下文达到 75% 的时候,通过 peaks-cli 的 cli 或者 hook 严格要求先压缩我感觉会更好的保证效果**".

rule.name: sub-agent-heartbeat-progress-red-line
rule.description: User hard rule (2026-06-07 1:30 GMT+8): "最好是任务全部派发完有个心跳机制可以动态的更新各自进度给 dispatcher,这样就不会被误认为假死".

rule.name: sub-agent-resource-lifecycle-red-line
rule.description: User hard rule (2026-06-07 1:19 GMT+8): "要加一条红线子 agent 不是越多越好,要合理创建,还有用完必须回收".

rule.name: sub-agent-shared-channel-cross-completion
rule.description: User hard rule (2026-06-07 1:46 GMT+8): "**而且只要有子 agent 完成就更新 dispatcher 的共享上下文,这样其他未完成的子 agent 也能感知**".

lesson.name: static-scan-must-cover-skills-tree-not-just-src
lesson.description: Path-construction static scans must cover skills/<skill>/references/*.md and SKILL.md, not just src/**/*.ts. Slice 005 src/-only scan missed the 5th writer (a markdown contract in qa-fanout-contract.md).

lesson.name: peaks-slice-check-axis-mismatch-false-negatives
lesson.description: peaks slice check looks for review-fanout at change-id axis (.peaks/<changeId>/rd/...) but artefacts live at session-id axis (.peaks/_runtime/<sessionId>/rd/...). False negatives on review-fanout + gate-verify-pipeline stages; QA verdict=pass is the authoritative gate.

lesson.name: commander-no-flag-sets-progress-false-not-noprogress-true
lesson.description: Commander.js --no-X flags set options.X = false (NOT options.noX = true). Reading options.noX === true is always wrong after a --no- prefix. Service-layer unit tests alone won't catch it; need e2e CLI-spawning tests. Slice #013 fix: options.noProgress === true → options.progress === false (+ type rename).

lesson.name: peaks-cli-request-init-filename-truncation-57-char-limit
lesson.description: peaks request init truncates artefact filenames to 57 characters silently. Slice #014's 58-char request-id (remove-legacy-progress-start-surface) hit REQUEST_NOT_FOUND until the file was renamed manually. New slices: keep slug <= 41 chars so the full path fits 57.

lesson.name: peaks-cli-file-size-scan-readfile-on-deleted-paths
lesson.description: peaks request transition rd → implemented calls file-size-scan at src/services/scan/file-size-scan.ts:39-42 which calls readFileSync on git-diff deleted paths and crashes. Slice #014 (5 source deletes + 2 test deletes) needed --allow-incomplete bypass. Workaround: pass --allow-incomplete --reason '<justification>'. Slice #015 fix: skip non-existent paths in the scan.

project.name: peaks-companion-watcher-ecs-url-config
